content:
A long time ago, this suggestion was made, but no improvements were implemented. With realm mechanics becoming more complex, the situation has worsened. This applies to both base realm mechanics and the realm mastery stat. For example, the full realm mastery description cannot be viewed in-game as it goes off-screen and cannot be scrolled.
Link to past UI update suggestion:
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1335099163217629285
The game's music is so good.  My number one requested feature (other than Traphase draft mode) is the ability to change Dorm music--similar to how we already are able to change wallpapers.

Even though some older limited characters have been added to the standard banner, the rates are so low that pulling them is unreasonable and cannot be guaranteed. Limited wheels are even worse since you cannot target a specific realm. I joined a month ago during the self-select event awakening banner (自選活動喚醒：久遠的呼喚) where you could choose a rate-up limited character and weapon, and it was very helpful for me when starting out. I have convinced some friends to start playing the game recently, but they do not have access to that banner and many of them are missing limited characters that can help out a lot with their teambuilding and progression. 

Please consider running the self-select event awakening banner more often. I think it is a big help to newer players since it gives them access to characters they cannot get otherwise. I think older players might not care as much about these select banners since the rate is not as good as the usual limited character/wheel banners, but for newer players they are very helpful and many of my friends would appreciate a self-select banner when starting out.
thread_title: Please do more [Self-Select Event Awakening] banners
